name_en: The D-Dream bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Fall/Winter Collection, offering a casual, modern look with practical functionality. With a soft silhouette, it is crafted from white lambskin featuring extra-large woven quilting for a stylish touch. It features a spacious zip compartment and two side pockets with magnetic flaps, both accented with vintage gold-finish metal CD logos for easy storage of daily items. The medium size comes with an adjustable top handle and an adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing it to be worn on the shoulder or crossbody, making it an ideal everyday companion.
name_cn:
The D-Dream bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Fall/Winter Collection, offering a casual, modern look with practical functionality. With a soft silhouette, it is crafted from white lambskin featuring extra-large woven quilting for a stylish touch. It features a spacious zip compartment and two side pockets with magnetic flaps, both accented with vintage gold-finish metal CD logos for easy storage of daily items. The medium size comes with an adjustable top handle and an adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing it to be worn on the shoulder or crossbody, making it an ideal everyday companion.
Main material: Lambskin
Lining: Cowhide<arg_value>CD logos on both sides<arg_value>Zip closure<arg_value>Adjustable top handle<arg_value>Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap<arg_value>Side pockets with magnetic flaps<arg_value>Interior slip pocket<arg_value>Includes dust bag<arg_value>Made in Italy Dimensions: 24 x 14 x 9 cm (L x H x W)<arg_value>Fits 1 wallet, 1 card holder, 1 mobile phone, sunglasses, and lipstick<arg_value>Top handle length: 50 - 56 cm<arg_value>Distance from top of handle to top of bag: 21 - 22 cm<arg_value>Dimensions and weight details may vary depending on product materials<arg_value>Style number: M6323
